heading: Extension of trust period for Indians of Klamath River Reservation
label: 348a Extension of trust period for Indians of Klamath River Reservation
text: The period of trust on lands allotted to Indians of the Klamath River Reservation, California, which expired , and the legal title to which is still in the United States, is reimposed and extended for a period of twenty-five years from : , That further extension of the period of trust may be made by the President, in his discretion, as provided by section 348 and .July 31, 1919July 31, 1919Providedsection 391 of this title
